content:
✔ Example: If XP isn’t used by Week 12, it decreases by 10% each week.
✔ Prevents hoarding and encourages students to engage throughout.

2. Should students be able to “bid” XP for in-class decision-making power?

✔ Example: If multiple students want to override a class decision (change the POV character, alter the weekly path), they must bid XP for influence.
✔ Encourages tactical social play & prioritization of resources.

3. Should there be a special “Zero XP” reward for students who never engage with the XP system but still excel?

✔ Example: “The Stoic Scholar” title – If a student never uses XP but still ranks in the top % of the class, they gain a unique distinction.
✔ Allows room for both gameplay-oriented and traditional learners.

🚀 Version 5.2 now fully locks in all mechanics, references, transitions, instructor actions, risk vs. reward, and hidden XP use.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 148 (chunk 148/555)
